title: Decor Essentials Large Artificial Hydrangea Stem, 71 cm, Cream Colour, Single Stem with Full Bloom (Dusky Pink)
features: DIMENSIONS: Premium artificial hydrangea stem measuring 71cm in height, featuring a large, full bloom head perfect for dramatic floral displays
REALISTIC DESIGN: Delicately crafted petals in soft champagne hues create a lifelike appearance that closely mimics natural hydrangeas
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for wedding centrepieces, home décor, office arrangements, or as standalone statement pieces in tall vases
MAINTENANCE FREE: Never wilts or drops petals, maintaining its beautiful appearance season after season without watering
ARRANGEMENT READY: Sturdy stem with realistic green leaves allows for easy positioning and combining with other artificial or fresh flowers
description: Transform your space with our stunning artificial hydrangea stems, featuring lush, full blooms in a delicate champagne hue. Each meticulously crafted stem stands 71cm tall, perfect for creating dramatic arrangements or standalone displays. The realistic petals capture the intricate detail and subtle colour variations of natural hydrangeas, while the sturdy stem and verdant leaves complete the lifelike appearance. These maintenance-free blooms are ideal for year-round decorating, whether arranged in tall vases, incorporated into wedding centrepieces, or displayed in corporate settings. The generous bloom size makes a striking visual impact, while the neutral colour palette complements any décor style. Create lasting arrangements that bring the timeless beauty of hydrangeas to your space without the need for watering or seasonal replacement.
